meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use Claude Code and Antigravity to build a high-impact portfolio rapidly. Overcome the 'no portfolio' trap with this expert-led, technical guide.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' trap, use Claude Code to automate architectural scaffolding and Antigravity to rapidly deploy production-grade features. By treating your portfolio as a series of micro-SaaS products, you demonstrate technical competency, system design expertise, and shipping velocity—the three metrics that actually convert leads into paying customers.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a founder's silent executioner. You have the vision and the technical intuition, but you lack the one thing that closes deals: a track record. While competitors hide behind polished landing pages, you are stuck in the 'tutorial hell' loop, unable to showcase the high-value systems you know you can build. 

This isn't about padding a resume with generic clones; it is about building a high-velocity engine that turns your ideas into shippable assets. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you will stop writing code and start orchestrating systems. We are going to bypass the manual labor of boilerplate and build a portfolio that signals immediate authority to your future clients.

steps.title: Architecting for Impact
steps.description: Don't build a blog; build a tool. We define a high-utility micro-SaaS project that solves a real business problem to demonstrate your capability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior SaaS Architect. Define a high-value MVP micro-SaaS feature that solves a common B2B pain point. Provide a technical schema and a modular file structure.

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate the core infrastructure, ensuring strict separation of concerns from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, production-ready React/Next.js architecture based on the schema. Use Tailwind for styling and ensure all components are strictly typed.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build the project scaffolding based on the architecture specs'

steps.title: Implementing Core Logic
steps.description: Focus on the business logic that provides value. Claude Code handles the boilerplate while you review the architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the core business logic for the defined MVP feature. Ensure the code is modular, performant, and includes error handling for edge cases.

steps.title: Integrating API Layers
steps.description: Build a robust backend interface. Claude Code excels at mapping database schemas to clean API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API layer that connects the frontend to the database. Include input validation and secure authentication patterns.

steps.title: Polishing and Documentation
steps.description: A portfolio project is only as good as its documentation. Use AI to generate a professional README that explains your technical decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a high-authority README.md that highlights the technical challenges solved, the design patterns used, and the business value of this tool.

pro_tips: Always define your tech stack constraints in the Claude Code system prompt to prevent the model from using deprecated libraries.
Treat your GitHub commit history as a narrative; use Claude Code to write descriptive, professional commit messages that show a logical development flow.
Focus on 'Hard Problems' like concurrency or complex data state management; these signals are more valuable to potential clients than UI perfection.
Use Antigravity to simulate load testing on your MVP; documenting how your code handles scale is a massive competitive advantage.
Never ship a portfolio piece without an 'Architecture Overview' PDF; it demonstrates the maturity of a Senior Engineer.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a production environment (like Vercel or AWS), document the business impact, and share it directly with your target audience on LinkedIn or niche developer forums.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the workflow to build a portfolio that converts prospects into revenue. Stop waiting for permission to be an expert. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
